reference: Hi Doctor, I had vaginal sex with two condoms without any breakage two weeks ago. I do not know the person I had sex with and am not aware of whether she has Human Immunodeficiency Virus or not. Am I at risk of getting a Human Immunodeficiency Virus infection from vaginal sex with two condoms? Does the partner's fluid that touches the shaft cause Human Immunodeficiency Virus transmission?
text: Hi Doctor, I had vaginal sex with 2 condoms without any breakage 2 weeks ago. I do not know the person I had sex with, and I'm not aware of whether she has human immunodeficiency virus or not. Am I at risk of getting a human immunodeficiency virus infection from vaginal sex with 2 condoms? Does the partner's fluid that touches the shafts—human immunodeficiency virus transmission?
